name: Techno Mathematical Co., Ltd.
summary: Techno Mathematical Co., Ltd. develops software and hardware IPs in Japan. Its products includes LSI/board, audio, video, still image, voice, encryption, multimedia BC, windows media, noise suppression, super resolution, lossless/visually lossless, FPGA, original codec, high compression, frame rate converter, low latency, filter, and Gstreamer. The company develops and licenses image, audio, and voice related software IPs for various types of digital equipment; and hardware IPs used for design data for silicon chips. It also provides and licenses single function LSIs based on IPs and solutions for various multimedia applications. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
